awesomeList.descriptionHTML: Curated list of python software and packages related to scientific research in audio
awesomeList.description: Curated list of python software and packages related to scientific research in audio

nodes.itemHTML: • pydiogmentstars46 :octocat:stars46 📦 - Audio Data Augmentation.
• spafestars128 :octocat:stars128 📦 - Python library for features extraction from audio files.
• sound_field_analysis :octocat:stars46 📦 - Analyze, visualize and process sound field data recorded by spherical microphone arrays.
• ReTiSARstars34 :octocat:stars34 - Binarual rendering of streamed or IR-based high-order spherical microphone array signals.
• musdb :octocat:stars90 📦 - Parse and process the MUSDB18 dataset.
• audiomatestars99 :octocat:stars99 📦 - Loading different types of audio datasets.
• mirdata :octocat:stars177 📦 - Common loaders for Music Information Retrieval (MIR) datasets.
• matcheringstars412 :octocat:stars412 📦 - Automated reference audio mastering.
• nnAudiostars465 :octocat:stars465 📦 - Accelerated audio processing using 1D convolution networks in PyTorch.
• NUSSL :octocat:stars391 📦 - Holistic source separation framework including DSP methods and deep learning methods.
• Jupyletstars127 :octocat:stars127 - Subtractive, additive, FM, and sample-based sound synthesis.
• audiomentationsstars509 :octocat:stars509 📦 - Audio Data Augmentation.
• muda :octocat:stars182 📦 - Musical Data Augmentation.
• pyannote.audiostars1k :octocat:stars1k 📦 - Neural building blocks for speaker diarization.

• pyannote.audio: neural building blocks for speaker diarization, Video - Hervé Bredin, Ruiqing Yin, Juan Manuel Coria, Gregory Gelly, Pavel Korshunov, Marvin Lavechin, Diego Fustes, Hadrien Titeux, Wassim Bouaziz, Marie-Philippe Gill, ICASSP 2020.
• gentlestars936 :octocat:stars936 - Forced-aligner built on Kaldi.
• commonfatestars17 :octocat:stars17 📦 - Common Fate Model and Transform.
• NIMFA :octocat:stars449 📦 - Several flavors of non-negative-matrix factorization.
• TimeSide (Beta) :octocat: - high level audio analysis, imaging, transcoding, streaming and labelling.
• mingusstars583 :octocat:stars583 📦 - Advanced music theory and notation package with MIDI file and playback support.
• pyAV :octocat:stars1.2k - PyAV is a Pythonic binding for FFmpeg or Libav.
• SIDEKIT 📦 - Speaker and Language recognition.
• Loudnessstars29 :octocat:stars29 - Perceived loudness, includes Zwicker, Moore/Glasberg model.
• pyloudnorm :octocat:stars187 - Audio loudness meter and normalization, implements ITU-R BS.1770-4.
• pypesqstars195 :octocat:stars195 - Wrapper for the PESQ score calculation.
• pystoistars169 :octocat:stars169 📦 - Short Term Objective Intelligibility measure (STOI).
• deepspeechstars17.3k :octocat:stars17.3k 📦 - Pretrained automatic speech recognition.
• persephone :octocat:stars131 📦 - Automatic phoneme transcription tool.
• sed_eval :octocat:stars88 📦 - Evaluation toolbox for Sound Event Detection
• Sound Field Synthesis Toolbox :octocat:stars45 📦 - Sound Field Synthesis Toolbox.
• Total number of packages: 66
• cochleastars83 :octocat:stars83 📦 - Inner ear models.
• SFS-Python :octocat:stars45 📦 - Sound Field Synthesis Toolbox.
• Parselmouthstars507 :octocat:stars507 📦 - Python interface to the Praat phonetics and speech analysis, synthesis, and manipulation software.
• essentia :octocat:stars1.8k - Music related low level and high level feature extractor, C++ based, includes Python bindings.
• Kaprestars738 :octocat:stars738 📦 - Keras Audio Preprocessors
• TorchAudiostars1.3k :octocat:stars1.3k - PyTorch Audio Loaders
• pyYAAFEstars191 :octocat:stars191 - Python bindings for YAAFE feature extractor.
• pyroomacousticsstars692 :octocat:stars692 📦 - Room Acoustics Simulation (RIR generator)
• stempegstars53 :octocat:stars53 📦 - read/write of STEMS multistream audio.
• msaf :octocat:stars308 📦 - Music Structure Analysis Framework.
• PyWavelets :octocat:stars1.1k 📦 - Discrete Wavelet Transform in Python.
• AudioTSM :octocat:stars61 📦 - real-time audio time-scale modification procedures.
• mutagen :octocat:stars776 📦 - Reads and writes all kind of audio metadata for various formats.
• speechpystars837 :octocat:stars837 📦 - Library for Speech Processing and Recognition, mostly feature extraction for now.
• (Py)Soundfile :octocat:stars6 📦 - Library based on libsndfile, CFFI, and NumPy.
• acoustics :octocat:stars312 📦 - useful tools for acousticians.
• librosa :octocat:stars4.5k 📦 - General audio and music analysis.
• Youtube-Downloader :octocat:stars94.5k 📦 - Download youtube videos (and the audio).
• Whirlwind Tour Of Python [:octocat:](https://github.com/jakevdp/WhirlwindTourOfPythonstars2.8k
• PyWorldVocoderstars435 :octocat:stars435 - Wrapper for Morise's World Vocoder.
• NSGT :octocat:stars73 📦 - Non-stationary gabor transform, constant-q.
• audiolazystars582 :octocat:stars582 📦 - Expressive Digital Signal Processing (DSP) package for Python.
• audioreadstars362 :octocat:stars362 📦 - Cross-library (GStreamer + Core Audio + MAD + FFmpeg) audio decoding.
• pySoxstars357 :octocat:stars357 📦 - Wrapper for sox.
• tinytagstars454 :octocat:stars454 📦 - reading music meta data of MP3, OGG, FLAC and Wave files.
• AudioTKstars225 :octocat:stars225 - DSP filter toolbox (lots of filters).
• Gammatonestars152 :octocat:stars152 - Gammatone filterbank implementation.
• pyFFTW :octocat:stars259 📦 - Wrapper for FFTW(3).
• MDCTstars32 :octocat:stars32 📦 - MDCT transform.
• pydub :octocat:stars5.3k 📦 - Manipulate audio with a simple and easy high level interface.
• pytftb :octocat:stars186 - Implementation of the MATLAB Time-Frequency Toolbox.
• PyRubberbandstars61 :octocat:stars61 📦 - Wrapper for rubberband to do pitch-shifting and time-stretching.
• Resampy :octocat:stars158 📦 - Sample rate conversion.
• STFT :octocat:stars36 📦 - Standalone package for Short-Time Fourier Transform.
• aubio :octocat:stars2.1k 📦 - Feature extractor, written in C, Python interface.
• audiolazystars582 :octocat:stars582 📦 - Realtime Audio Processing lib, general purpose.
• python_speech_featuresstars1.9k :octocat:stars1.9k 📦 - Common speech features for ASR.
• aeneas :octocat:stars1.9k 📦 - Forced aligner, based on MFCC+DTW, 35+ languages.
• pyAudioAnalysisstars3.9k² :octocat:stars3.9k 📦 - Feature Extraction, Classification, Diarization.
• py-webrtcvadstars1.1k :octocat:stars1.1k 📦 - Interface to the WebRTC Voice Activity Detector.
• SpeechRecognitionstars5.6k :octocat:stars5.6k 📦 - Wrapper for several ASR engines and APIs, online and offline.
• Catchystars15 :octocat:stars15 - Corpus Analysis Tools for Computational Hook Discovery.
• Madmom :octocat:stars739 📦 - MIR packages with strong focus on beat detection, onset detection and chord recognition.
• mir_eval :octocat:stars361 📦 - Common scores for various MIR tasks. Also includes bss_eval implementation.
• python-sounddevicestars533 :octocat: 📦 - PortAudio wrapper providing realtime audio I/O with NumPy.
• Soundcloud APIstars62 :octocat:stars62 📦 - Wrapper for Soundcloud API.
• Python for audio signal processing - John C. Glover, Victor Lazzarini and Joseph Timoney, Linux Audio Conference 2011.
• librosa: Audio and Music Signal Analysis in Python, Video - Brian McFee, Colin Raffel, Dawen Liang, Daniel P.W. Ellis, Matt McVicar, Eric Battenberg, Oriol Nieto, Scipy 2015.
• Python Data Science Handbookstars29.1k - Jake Vanderplas, Excellent Book and accompanying tutorial notebooks.
• Fundamentals of Music Processing - Meinard Müller, comes with Python exercises.
• Coursera Course - Audio Signal Processing, Python based course from UPF of Barcelona and Stanford University.
• Digital Signal Processing Course - Masters Course Material (University of Rostock) with many Python examples.
• Slack Channel - Music Information Retrieval Community.
• VamPy Host 📦 - Interface compiled vamp plugins.
• beets :octocat:stars10.1k 📦 - Music library manager and MusicBrainz tagger.
• medleydb :octocat:stars116 - Parse medleydb audio + annotations.
• PYO :octocat:stars933 - Realtime audio dsp engine.
• Music21 :octocat:stars1.3k 📦 - Toolkit for Computer-Aided Musicology.
• Mido :octocat:stars804 📦 - Realtime MIDI wrapper.
• Pretty-MIDI :octocat:stars496 📦 - Utility functions for handling MIDI data in a nice/intuitive way.
• NTFLibstars44 :octocat:stars44 - Sparse Beta-Divergence Tensor Factorization.
• Brian2 :octocat:stars548 📦 - Spiking neural networks simulator, includes cochlea model.
• Montreal Forced Aligner :octocat:stars532 - Forced aligner, based on Kaldi (HMM), English (others can be trained).
